items.title: Testing business ideas: Aligning strategy with IP protection
items.author: Lisa Desjardins (CIPO), David Bland (Author), Kevin Dahl (Innovate Calgary)
items.content: David Bland, author of , and Kevin Dahl, Director of ElevateIP Alberta at Innovate Calgary, explore how to better balance your business strategy with IP considerations. Consider gathering real evidence from customers before spending a fortune building the wrong product. Learn how to identify your riskiest business assumptions using practical frameworks and strategically structure your testing process to avoid accidentally disclosing or compromising your valuable IP.

items.title: Managing IP disputes: mediation, arbitration and other solutions
items.author: Lisa Desjardins (CIPO), Justine Ferland (WIPO), Gary Lacasse (ADRIC)
items.content: Facing an IP dispute? There are resolution options that don’t require going to court and the associated fees. Gary Lacasse, Executive Director of the Alternative Dispute Resolution Institute of Canada (ADRIC) and Justine Ferland, legal officer, WIPO Arbitration and Mediation Centre, explore how alternative dispute resolution can help resolve conflicts and protect intellectual property. From mediation to arbitration, they discuss when these approaches make sense and how they help preserve time and business relationships.

items.title: How the Innovation Asset Collective helps cleantech companies succeed
items.author: Lisa Desjardins (CIPO), Erin Pisko (IAC)
items.content: The Innovation Asset Collective (IAC) is on a mission to help cleantech companies understand the value of their IP. Erin Pisko, Vice-President of IP Strategy at the IAC, uses real-world examples to show on which components of an IP strategy cleantech companies should focus. The IAC’s core programming provides a comprehensive suite of supports, including funding and skill-building to help increase patenting activity in the cleantech sector.

items.title: Inside Elevate IP - How Canadian startups can access funding, and IP expertise
items.author: Lisa Desjardins (CIPO), Laura Cooke (ISED), Louis-Félix Binette (MAIN), Lola Arnaud (MAIN)
items.content:
How does ElevateIP help deliver IP support to businesses? 

Laura Cooke (ISED), Louis-Félix Binette, and Lola Arnaud (MAIN) answer this important question and more. Hear about how to access funding and how support is structured to promote long-term growth for your company.

Note: This episode was recorded in 2023 and since then ElevateIP has been awarded new funding to continue delivering on their mission to help businesses build their IP strategies.

items.title: Navigating the global ocean of IP—A Black entrepreneur’s perspective on protection and opportunity
items.author: CIPO, Ken Poulin
items.content: Ken Poulin is an independent trademark agent based in Vancouver. He explains why IP protection should start before and not after market success. As a Black entrepreneur himself, he shares his insights on what it looks like to support underrepresented communities, the role of diversity in Canada's innovation landscape and why educating business owners about the value of IP requires patience, empathy and a personal approach.
